g.text: (runs on every reconcile pass, across all ProvisionedResources)
The Health Observer is invoked on every reconcile pass —
including periodic resyncs — not only when a ResourceRequest
event triggers reconciliation. It operates independently of
the Provisioning State Machine and reads all ProvisionedResource
objects in ''provisioned'' or ''updating'' phase from the
Degraded status surfaced in the portal
Case 3 — NotFound + ProvisionedResource NOT in ''deleting'' phase
AUDIT TRADE-OFF: This re-apply bypasses the
approval workflow and produces no ResourceRequest
audit trail entry. Operators who require an audit
trail for all target-cluster writes should disable
this behaviour and instead alert on status.phase = unknown,
treating out-of-band deletion as a manual incident.
will be observed on the next reconcile pass.
Deletion in progress via a portal
